title: CopyComponent
description: Allows you to copy a component/nbt data of an item
body:
# CopyComponent

Allows you to copy a component/nbt data of an item with a keybind.
To use:

1. Open any inventorylike screen.
2. Hover the item you want to copy
3. Press the copy keybind, by default `F3` + `K`. Can be changed under the debug category.
4. Voila! Copy it in a text file, if you want to read it.
